summary: Plan-only live PR inventory shard. No shared canonical is present or implied; all five hydrated open PRs are independent maintainer-review candidates, with no safe duplicate, superseded, low-signal, security-route, merge, or fix action available under this job.

actions.reason: Standalone docs PR with useful scoped changes; no duplicate/superseded/low-signal evidence and closing is not enabled by the job.
Focused contributor PR with linked issue context and tests; keep it as its own maintainer-review item rather than closing or folding it into this inventory shard.
Large feature/provider PR is not a duplicate or low-signal closeout candidate; it needs ordinary maintainer review outside this inventory cluster.
Focused UI PR with useful code and linked issue context, but failing checks block any stronger recommendation; keep as an independent maintainer-review item.
Focused config/gateway PR with linked issue context; failing check and job-level merge/fix blocks mean it should remain an independent maintainer-review item.
